content.en:
In a territory far away from the purple light world, Ye Tian found a continent, hid in it, and began to fuse god-level purple light talent and god-level purple armor talent.

An hour later, Ye Tian had completely fused these two talents.

At this time, he already knew a lot about the purple light talent and the purple armor talent.

In fact, these two talents are not powerful, such as the purple light talent, which can release a purple light that can erode the flesh, so it looks very terrifying.

If it is against a strong person who can be immune to purple light, then the purple light talent will be almost abolished, and it is even far inferior to the ordinary god-level talent.

And the same is true of the purple armor talent, which is very powerful in resisting purple light, but when used for defense, it is far inferior to the god-level defense talent, and even more powerful than the arcane-level defense talent.

But the purple light talent and purple armor talent allowed Ye Tian to easily resist and refine the purple light, helping him refine his body.

These two talents could not improve Ye Tian's strength, but they could make Ye Tian's survival chances in the Purple Light World infinitely increase, as if he regarded the Purple Light World as his own back garden.

Of course, the premise is that he can compete with the Purple Spirit Golden Worm Clan, otherwise he would not dare to enter the Purple Light World.

"Senior Brother Pengyu, how is the purple light world?"

Ye Tianchuan asked.

Soon, Peng Yu Tianjun sent a message-

"The Purple Spirit Golden Worm didn't rush out of the Purple Light World!"

Hearing this news, Ye Tian hurriedly went to the Purple Light World, and arrived outside the Purple Light World after a while.

Those Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs who originally escaped have basically returned, after all, the living Purple Spirit Golden Worm can't leave the Purple Light World, as long as they don't enter the Purple Light World, there will be no danger, so what is there to be afraid of?

"Ten Thousand Laws!"

A disciple of the Void Heaven Hall said respectfully.

"Where's Senior Brother Pengyu?"

Ye Tian didn't see Pengyu Tianjun, so he couldn't help asking.

The Black Armor Heavenly Monarch said, "Daozi, Senior Brother Pengyu has just entered the Purple Light World again!"

"What!" Ye Tian was shocked, "Isn't there a lot of Purple Spirit Golden Worms in the Purple Light World, how did Senior Brother Pengyu get in!"

"To collect the corpse of the Purple Spirit Golden Worm!"

Peng Yu Tianjun came out of the purple light world, appeared beside Ye Tian, and said with a smile.

"Purple Spirit Golden Worm corpse?"

Ye Tian was a little unclear.

At this time, Peng Yu Tianjun took out a bunch of purple spirit gold insect corpses and said, "These purple spirit gold insect corpses can be refined into purple spirit battle armor, and the purple spirit battle armor can allow me to wait until I enter the purple light world and be immune to a part of the purple light erosion." If all the gods and heavenly monarchs wore purple spirit battle armor, they would naturally not be afraid of the purple spirit golden insect race. The Purple Spirit Battle Armor is a kind of battle armor researched by the Dao Source First Line, and I will go to the Heavenly Monarch of the Dao Source First Line later, and ask them to help refine a batch of Purple Spirit Battle Armor!"

Dao Yuan One Pulse!

Ye Tian knew that this faction was a great force that was not weaker than the Void Heaven lineage, and it had three Dao Ancestors.

The Dao Yuan Yi line is good at refining weapons, and many Dao weapons in the chaos are refined by them, and their status in the chaos is very high, and even some Dao Ancestors ask them to help refine weapons.

Although the Dao Source Pulse that entered the Great Universe was not strong, the level of refining weapons was definitely the first, and no force could match them.

This time, it was also the Daoyuan vein that quickly researched the Purple Spirit Battle Armor from the Purple Spirit Golden Worm, and used the Purple Spirit Battle Armor to resist the purple light.

"The Dao Source Pulse is really terrifying!" Ye Tian exclaimed, if it was him, he would never have thought of this refining method, but the Dao Source Pulse was only studied in a few hours, what a fast speed!

A few days later.

Peng Yu Tianjun came over with a batch of purple spirit battle armors, but the disciples of the Void Heaven Hall also had to pay some price if they wanted to obtain a purple spirit battle armor, otherwise they would hunt the purple spirit golden worm by themselves and go to the Daoyuan line to refine the purple spirit battle armor.

However, Ye Tian got a set of Purple Spirit Battle Armor for free, which was given to him by Peng Yu Tianjun.

Ye Tian was a little curious about the Purple Spirit Battle Armor, so he accepted it.

"According to what Pengyu Tianjun said, the Purple Spirit Battle Armor is also divided into several grades, some weak Purple Spirit Gold Worms, even if there are enough of them, can only refine a set of low-grade Purple Spirit Battle Armor, the Purple Spirit Gold Worm at the peak of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, only ten of them are needed to refine the medium-grade Purple Spirit Battle Armor, and ten half-step True Spirit Realm Purple Spirit Gold Worms can refine a set of high-grade Purple Spirit Battle Armor with their bodies. What I have in my hand is a set of low-grade purple spirit battle armor, but it is also enough to resist some of the purple light. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, he didn't need the Purple Spirit Battle Armor much, because he had a god-level purple light talent and a god-level purple armor talent, which was completely equivalent to a Purple Spirit Golden Worm.

The Purple Spirit Golden Worm can live in the Purple Light World all the time, even if he can't live in the Purple Light World all the time due to his race, he can still survive for a long time.

However, he still refined this set of low-grade purple spirit battle armor.

After refining, Ye Tian understood the principle of the Purple Spirit Battle Armor, it turned out that the Purple Spirit Battle Armor was to stimulate part of the power of the Purple Armor's talent, so as to resist the erosion of a part of the purple light.

"The Dao Source Pulse is really powerful, it can actually stimulate the power of the purple armor talent of the dead purple spirit golden worm, so they should also be able to stimulate the power of the purple light talent and create a weapon that can release purple light?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, even if the purple light talent is stimulated, the power of the purple light released is very weak, and it is almost a luxury to use it to deal with the purple spirit golden insect, and it is useless to use it against the Heavenly Monarch.

Therefore, the creation of the Purple Spirit Battle Armor is the best use of the corpse of the Purple Spirit Golden Worm.

In the days that followed, many Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs purchased a set of Purple Spirit Battle Armor.

The Heavenly Monarch is the main force of the other party's Purple Spirit Golden Worm, where the god general is just sweeping the tail work, although he dares to enter the purple light world, but he is only wandering in the outermost periphery, and he does not dare to go deep into the depths of the purple light world at all.

With the assistance of the Purple Spirit Battle Armor, the Heavenly Monarchs entered the depths of the Purple Light World, and through joint cooperation, they killed the Purple Spirit Golden Worm one by one.

The number of Purple Spirit Golden Worms seems to be endless, but in fact there are so many, with the slaughter of the Heavenly Monarchs, most of the Purple Spirit Golden Worms have fallen, and the pressure on the cultivators has naturally been reduced a lot, so many big forces have sent a large number of people into the Purple Light World.

And because of the Purple Spirit Battle Armor, some god generals also dare to enter the inner area of the Purple Light World, at least they can rely on the Purple Spirit Battle Armor to resist the purple light erosion of the Pearl Purple Light World.

And Ye Tian also entered the purple light world.

This time, he did not enter the Purple Light World to cultivate, but prepared to go deep into the depths of the Purple Light World to find some resources.

As far as he knew, some of the elixirs and spiritual grasses bred in the depths of the purple light world contained very mild purple light, and the degree of erosion of the physical body was very weak, but it could greatly refine the physical body, which was a supreme treasure.

Therefore, Ye Tian wanted to go deep into the purple light world and collect more of these resources so that he could prepare for cultivating the Xuanxuan Secret in the future.
